title: Transformers Remember First, Forget Last: Dual-Process Interference in LLMs
summary: arXiv:2603.00270v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: When large language models encounter conflicting information in context, which memories survive -- early or recent? title: Qualcomm shrinks AI reasoning chains by 2.4x to fit thinking models on smartphones
summary: Qualcomm AI Research has developed a modular system that brings reasoning-capable language models to smartphones by compressing the models' verbose thought processes by a factor of 2.4.
